auth.homeTitle: Share what matters with your circle.
auth.homeBody: A focused social space for updates, conversations, and everyday moments.
auth.continueFeed: Sign in to continue to your feed.
auth.loginTitle: Turn every store visit into publish-ready content.
auth.loginBody: Record trips, keep visit histories, and use AI to shape posts for your social channels.
auth.loginProofFeedBody: Keep stores, trips, media, and notes organized.
auth.loginProofPrivateBody: Draft captions and social posts before sharing.
auth.registerTitle: Create a cleaner place for your daily updates.
auth.registerBody: Join your people with a simple profile and a feed built for clarity.
auth.name: Name

feed.title: Feed
feed.subtitle: Catch up on useful updates from your people without the noise.
feed.composer: Share an update with your circle
feed.firstPost: Your feed is ready. Connect this list to the posts API when the backend endpoint is available.
feed.secondPost: Signed in successfully. Romlek now opens with a calmer feed built around updates, media, and your circle.

media.title: Studio
media.subtitle: Manage uploaded images, videos, and files for your content workspace.
media.uploadBody: Add images, videos, or files to your media library.
media.publicUploadBody: Visible anywhere this media is used.
media.uploadRequiresUploader: Cannot upload because the current user ID is missing. Please sign in again.
media.uploadSuccess: Upload complete. The media library has been refreshed.
media.emptyBody: Uploaded images and videos will appear here.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyBody: Likes, replies, follows, and mentions will appear here.

messages.title: Messages
messages.placeholder: Select a conversation to keep the discussion going.

profile.title: Profile
profile.bio: Building a focused social space with Romlek.
profile.settingsBody: Adjust language and theme for your Romlek workspace.
profile.accountBody: Review the public details attached to this profile.
profile.activityBody: A focused view of recent posts, replies, and media.
profile.activityPostBody: A visit recap is ready to turn into captions, hashtags, and a social post.
profile.activityReplyBody: Your workspace is ready for reviewing media, trip notes, and publishing drafts.
